entries.source: A good learning session has a loop
entries.value: A good aprendizaje session has a loop

entries.source: A practical look at how AI can make learning clearer, more personal, and more accessible without turning students into passive answer collectors.
entries.value: Una mirada práctica a cómo la IA puede hacer que el aprendizaje sea más claro, personal y accesible sin convertir a los estudiantes en recolectores pasivos de respuestas.

entries.source: A serious learning companion should help with the work around the answer:
entries.value: Un compañero de aprendizaje serio debe ayudar con el trabajo que rodea la respuesta:

entries.source: Access matters
entries.value: El acceso importa

entries.source: AI learning
entries.value: Aprendizaje con IA

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: Un compañero de aprendizaje con IA no debe fingir ser una autoridad mágica. No debe borrar la incertidumbre, reemplazar a los docentes ni entrenar a los estudiantes para copiar respuestas. Los mejores sistemas son honestos sobre sus límites y claros sobre la diferencia entre ayuda y sustitución.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
entries.value: Pide un primer paso pequeño.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.
entries.value: Pide a la IA que revise tu razonamiento.

entries.source: checking whether the learner can explain the idea back.
entries.value: comprobar si el estudiante puede volver a explicar la idea.

entries.source: choosing the right starting level;
entries.value: elegir el nivel inicial adecuado;

entries.source: End with a recap from memory.
entries.value: Termina con un resumen de memoria.

entries.source: For a learner, that can feel very different from searching the web. Search gives pages. A learning companion gives a path.
entries.value: Para un estudiante, eso puede sentirse muy distinto a buscar en la web. La búsqueda entrega páginas. Un compañero de aprendizaje ofrece una ruta.

entries.source: For a wider view of how the public pages connect, browse the AI learning map, the subject hubs, or the AI learning prompt library. Those pages are designed to make the product understandable to learners and discoverable to search systems without hiding the useful parts behind an account wall.
entries.value: Para ver mejor cómo se conectan las páginas públicas, explora el mapa de aprendizaje con IA, los centros por materia o la biblioteca de indicaciones de aprendizaje con IA. Esas páginas están diseñadas para que el producto sea comprensible para los estudiantes y detectable por los sistemas de búsqueda sin esconder las partes útiles detrás de una cuenta.

entries.source: giving examples before abstractions when needed;
entries.value: dar ejemplos antes que abstracciones cuando haga falta;

entries.source: Information is everywhere. Understanding is still unevenly distributed.
entries.value: La información está en todas partes. La comprensión sigue distribuida de forma desigual.

entries.source: noticing what the learner already understands;
entries.value: noticing qué el estudiante alleery understands;

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Private tutoring es powerful, but it es not equally available. A free público IA learning platform pueden help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place a learn.

entries.source: Repair the weak spot.
entries.value: Repara el punto débil.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
entries.value: Say el goal en ordinary language.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything if you have a topic in mind. Try Socratic Instruction if you want questions instead of an explanation. Use Flashcard Builder when you need to remember, or Exam Prep Planner when the problem is organizing your study time.
entries.value: Start con Aprende cualquier cosa if you have a topic in mind. Try Instrucción socrática if you want preguntas en lugar de an explanation. Use Creador de tarjetas de estudio when you necesitan to recordar, or Planificador de preparación de exámenes when el problem is organizing your estudio time.

entries.source: That does not replace teachers, communities, books, or schools. It gives learners another route in. It can help a student start homework, a parent explain a concept, a self-taught builder learn code, or a curious person follow a question that might otherwise disappear.
entries.value: Eso no sustituye a docentes, comunidades, libros ni escuelas. Da a los estudiantes otra vía de entrada. Puede ayudar a un estudiante a empezar una tarea, a una familia a explicar un concepto, a una persona autodidacta a aprender código o a una persona curiosa a seguir una pregunta que de otro modo podría desaparecer.

entries.source: That gap is why an AI learning companion matters. A good companion does more than answer a question. It helps a learner choose a starting point, explains the idea in plain language, checks whether it made sense, and keeps going when the first explanation does not land.
entries.value: Eso gap is why an IA aprendizaje companion matters. A good companion does more than respuesta a pregunta. It ayudars a estudiante elegir a empezaring point, explicars el idea in plain language, comprobars whether it made sense, and manteners going when el first explanation does not land.

entries.source: That is especially important for homework. The useful question is not "Can AI produce the answer?" It usually can. The useful question is "Can AI help the learner understand the path to the answer?" That is why the guide on studying with AI without cheating yourself focuses on hints, checks, and transfer practice.
entries.value: Eso es especialmente importante para las tareas. La pregunta útil no es "¿Puede la IA producir la respuesta?" Normalmente puede. La pregunta útil es "¿Puede la IA ayudar al estudiante a entender el camino hacia la respuesta?" Por eso la guía sobre estudiar con IA sin engañarte se centra en pistas, comprobaciones y práctica de transferencia.

entries.source: That is the standard inspir is aiming for: learning that feels accessible, personal, playful, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: Eso is el standard inspir is aiming for: aprendizaje eso feels accessible, personal, playful, and usarful for anyone con curiosidad and an internet conectarion.

entries.source: That is why inspir separates learning jobs into public modes. If you want a gentle explanation, start with Learn Anything. If you want to reason through a concept instead of being lectured, use Socratic Instruction. If you are stuck on an assignment, Homework Coach is a better fit than a generic answer engine. The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Por eso inspir separa las tareas de aprendizaje en modos públicos. Si quieres una explicación sencilla, empieza con Aprende cualquier cosa. Si quieres razonar sobre un concepto en vez de recibir una clase larga, usa Instrucción socrática. Si estás atascado en una tarea, Entrenador de tareas encaja mejor que un motor genérico de respuestas. El formato debe servir a la tarea de aprendizaje.

entries.source: That loop appears across the platform. Math Step Coach breaks a problem into steps. Flashcard Builder turns notes into recall practice. Quiz Me On Trivia adds pressure-tested retrieval. Writing Coach helps improve a draft without replacing the writer.
entries.value: Ese ciclo aparece en toda la plataforma. Entrenador de pasos de matemáticas divide un problema en pasos. Creador de tarjetas de estudio convierte notas en práctica de recuerdo. Hazme un cuestionario de cultura general añade recuperación bajo presión. Writing Coach ayuda a mejorar un borrador sin reemplazar a quien escribe.

entries.source: The best AI learning sessions are not one long answer. They look more like a loop:
entries.value: Las mejores sesiones de aprendizaje con IA no son una respuesta larga. Se parecen más a un ciclo:

entries.source: The best outcome is not a perfect answer. It is the moment a learner says, "I think I get it now. Let me try."
entries.value: best outcome is not a perfect respuesta. It is el moment a estudiante says, "I think I get it now. Let me try."

entries.source: The common idea is simple: keep the learner active. AI should make thinking easier to start, not unnecessary to do.
entries.value: common idea is simple: mantener el estudiante active. IA debe hacer thinking easier to empezar, not unnecessary to do.

entries.source: The easiest version of an AI tutor is a box that gives polished answers. That is useful sometimes, but it is not enough. A learner who only receives answers can leave with the page finished and the skill unchanged.
entries.value: easiest version of an IA tutor is a box eso dars polished respuestas. Eso es útil sometimes, but it is not enough. A estudiante who only receives respuestas puede leave con el page finished and el skill unchanged.

entries.source: The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: El formato debe servir a la tarea de aprendizaje.

entries.source: The goal is confidence
entries.value: El objetivo es la confianza

entries.source: The important move is to start with a real learning job, not a perfect prompt. A good companion can help shape the path once you begin.
entries.value: important move is to empezar con a real aprendizaje job, not a perfect prompt. A good companion puede ayudar shape el ruta once you begin.

entries.source: The job is not just answering
entries.value: La tarea no consiste solo en responder

entries.source: The most useful AI learning tools have a few habits in common:
entries.value: Las herramientas de aprendizaje con IA más útiles comparten algunos hábitos:

entries.source: They adapt the level without making the learner feel small.
entries.value: Ellos adapt el level sin making el estudiante feel small.

entries.source: They ask questions when the goal is unclear.
entries.value: Ellos preguntar preguntas when el goal is unclear.

entries.source: They encourage practice, not just reading.
entries.value: Ellos encourage práctica, no solo leering.

entries.source: They give examples that match the learner's world.
entries.value: Ellos dar examples eso match el estudiante's world.

entries.source: They make uncertainty visible when facts need checking.
entries.value: Ellos hacer uncertainty visible when facts necesitan comprobaring.

entries.source: This is why inspir is built around learning modes. Sometimes you need a clear explanation. Sometimes you need Socratic questions. Sometimes you need a quiz, flashcards, debate practice, a writing coach, or a historical roleplay.
entries.value: Por eso inspir está construido alrededor de modos de aprendizaje. A veces necesitas una explicación clara. A veces necesitas preguntas socráticas. A veces necesitas un cuestionario, tarjetas, práctica de debate, un coach de escritura o un juego de roles histórico.

entries.source: This matters for schools and families because the first barrier is often not talent. It is the cost of help, the fear of asking a "basic" question, or the lack of a patient person at the exact moment confusion appears. A free public companion lowers the cost of beginning.
entries.value: Esto matters for escuelas and families porque el first barrier is often not talent. It is el cost of ayudar, el fear of preguntaring a "basic" pregunta, or el lack of a patient person at el exact moment confusion appears. A free público companion lowers el cost of beginning.

entries.source: Try the companion
entries.value: Probar el compañero

entries.source: Try the step yourself.
entries.value: Intenta hacer el paso por tu cuenta.

entries.source: turning passive reading into practice;
entries.value: convertir la lectura pasiva en práctica;

entries.source: What an AI learning companion should do for everyone
entries.value: Qué an IA aprendizaje companion should do para everyone

entries.source: What it should not do
entries.value: Qué it should not do

entries.source: What the companion should provide
entries.value: Qué the companion should provide
